selections.name: Queen Jeddah
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly in barrier 1, which is a massive advantage at Ipswich. Boasts a strong speed figure of 71 and drops nicely into this.

selections.name: Krumac
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a solid 70 speed figure. Gets a great inside draw to stalk the pace.

selections.name: Swing State
selections.reason: Top weight is a slight concern on the soft track, but has the class to feature if he can overcome the impost.

selections.name: Cool Drinks
selections.reason: Coming off a win last start and showing upward trajectory. Can figure in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Problematical
danger_horse.reason: Broke through last time out and could surprise if the pace collapses.

selections.name: True Intent
selections.reason: Highest recent speed figure in the field (60). If he gains a start, he is the one to beat based on raw ability.

selections.name: Harry's Mode
selections.reason: Solid speed figure of 55 and has shown enough early toe to overcome the slightly tricky draw.

selections.name: Portnova
selections.reason: Placed on debut with a 53 speed figure. Wide draw is a penalty but has upside.

selections.name: Winning Harlow
selections.reason: First starter drawn the pole. The inside barrier is gold here and trials have been adequate.

danger_horse.name: Boom Daggar
danger_horse.reason: First starter from a good stable. Watch betting markets closely.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Win Bet #14e (if starts, otherwise #3), Exacta Box 3-14e, Trifecta 3,14e / 3,10,14e / 1,3,10,12,14e

selections.name: My Girl Marley
selections.reason: Clear top pick on speed figures (72). The wide draw is a negative, but she has the early speed to cross and dictate.

selections.name: Inkwell
selections.reason: Solid form with a 63 speed figure. Will be stalking the leaders and ready to pounce.

selections.name: Mishani Inferno
selections.reason: Inside draw is a big plus. Speed figure of 58 puts her right in the mix for minors.

selections.name: Brooke's Blooms
selections.reason: Drawn beautifully in barrier 2. Can improve off her debut effort.

danger_horse.name: Syrian Diamond
danger_horse.reason: Gets the coveted rail draw and could show sharp improvement.

selections.name: Firm Agreement
selections.reason: Massive class drop from BM78/BM94 company. Speed figures of 78-86 dwarf this field. Drawn perfectly.

selections.name: Our Brave Lini
selections.reason: Consistent type with a 67 speed figure. Will be competitive for the placings.

selections.name: Benzino
selections.reason: Last start winner with a 62 speed figure. Confidence is high but meets a class runner here.

selections.name: Montevecchio
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw and comes off a solid 60 speed figure. Good exotic inclusion.

danger_horse.name: Classic Shiraz
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping up in the placings on best form.

selections.name: English Conqueror
selections.reason: Great draw and top speed figure of 62. Poised to strike from an ideal stalking position.

selections.name: Coccinella
selections.reason: Inside draw is a huge advantage. Solid form with a 53 speed figure.

selections.name: Captivate Legend
selections.reason: Consistent performer. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the ability to overcome it.

selections.name: Hell Of A High
selections.reason: Placed last start and showing improvement. Needs luck from the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: I Say I Say
danger_horse.reason: Can figure in the finish if the pace is hot early.

selections.name: Slipsain
selections.reason: Top speed figure of 66. Will need to navigate the barrier but has a class edge.

selections.name: Piertaga
selections.reason: Inside draw is perfect. Won two starts back with a 63 speed figure.

selections.name: Chayse 'N' Leisa
selections.reason: Good draw and consistent form. Speed figure of 58 puts him right in this.

selections.name: Switchblade
selections.reason: Okay speed and can run into the placings with a clean trip.

danger_horse.name: Summit
danger_horse.reason: Has shown flashes of ability and could surprise at odds.

selections.name: I Stole It
selections.reason: Gets the coveted rail draw. Good speed figure of 61 and will be very hard to catch around this tight track.

selections.name: Calmer Karma
selections.reason: Won last start with a 59 speed figure. Wide draw is the only knock.

selections.name: Majestic Louvre
selections.reason: Solid form and a 55 speed figure. Can stalk the pace and finish well.

selections.name: Coincide
selections.reason: Consistent type but faces a tough task from the outside barrier.

danger_horse.name: Yes I'm Ugly
danger_horse.reason: Capable of a high rating on his day. Don't dismiss entirely.

selections.name: Aeropower
selections.reason: Inside draw and won last start. Speed figure of 53 is competitive here.

selections.name: Enchaanted
selections.reason: Also a last start winner. Speed figure of 51 keeps her in the mix.

selections.name: Riva D'amor
selections.reason: Good speed figure of 57 but has to overcome a terrible wide draw.

selections.name: Miss Zermatt
selections.reason: Consistent mare who can feature in the exotics despite the wide gate.

danger_horse.name: Hannabana
danger_horse.reason: Could sneak into the minors if the pace setup favors her.

selections.name: Ardie Three
selections.reason: Great inside draw and top speed figure of 68. Looks perfectly placed to win.

selections.name: Tinklejazz
selections.reason: Won last start with a strong 66 speed figure. Main danger to the top pick.

selections.name: Tulong
selections.reason: Inside draw and a last start winner. Speed figure of 63 is very solid.

selections.name: Devine Squire
selections.reason: Another last start winner with a 65 speed figure. Deep race but he belongs.

danger_horse.name: Tartan Tiger
danger_horse.reason: Consistent and can add value to the exotics.
